2147549183 (0x8000FFFF).message: MDM enrollment hasn't been configured yet on Microsoft Entra ID, or the enrollment URL isn't expected. Enable automatic enrollment

2149056536 (0x80180018) MENROLL_E_USERLI.message: License of user is in bad state blocking enrollment Assign licenses to users

2149056555 (0x8018002B) MENROLL_E_MDM_NO.message: When trying to automatically enroll to Intune, but the Microsoft Entra configuration isn't fully applied. This issue should be transient, as the device retries after a short time.

2149056554 (0x\u202d8018002A\u202c) &nbs.message: The user canceled the operation If MDM enrollment requires multi-factor authentication, and the user hasn't signed in with a supported second factor, Windows displays a toast notification to the user to enroll. If the user doesn't respond to toast notification, this error occurs. This issue should b

2149056532 (0x80180014) MENROLL_E_DEVICE.message: Mobile device management isn't supported. Check device restrictions.

2149056533 (0x80180015) MENROLL_E_NOTSUP.message: Mobile device management isn't supported. Check device restrictions.

2149056514 (0x80180002) MENROLL_E_DEVICE.message: Server failed to authenticate the user There's no Microsoft Entra token for the user. Make sure the user can authenticate to Microsoft Entra ID.

2147942450 (0x\u202d80070032\u202c) &nbs.message: MDM auto-enrollment is only supported on Windows RS3 and above. Make sure the device meets the minimum requirements for co-management.

3400073293.message: ADAL user realm account response unknown Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

3399548929.message: Need user sign-in This issue should be transient. It occurs when the user quickly signs out before the enrollment task happens.

3400073236.message: ADAL security token request failed. Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

3400073247.message: ADAL-integrated Windows authentication is only supported in federated flow Plan your Microsoft Entra hybrid join implementation

3399942148.message: The server or proxy wasn't found. This issue should be transient, when the client can't communicate with cloud. If it persists, make sure the client has consistent connectivity to Azure.

2149056532.message: Specific platform or version is not supported Make sure the device meets the minimum requirements for co-management.

2147943568.message: Element not found This issue should be transient. If it persists, contact Microsoft Support.

2192179208.message: Not enough memory resources are available to process this command. This issue should be transient, it should resolve itself when the client retries.

3399614467.message: ADAL Authorization grant failed for this assertion Check your Microsoft Entra configuration, and make sure that users can successfully authenticate.

2149056517.message: Generic Failure from management server, such as DB access error This issue should be transient. If it persists, contact Microsoft Support.

2149134055.message: Winhttp name not resolved The client can't resolve the name of the service. Check the DNS configuration.

2149134050.message: internet timeout This issue should be transient, when the client can't communicate with cloud. If it persists, make sure the client has consistent connectivity to Azure.

10.message: Waiting for the maintenance window before installing

Software Distribution - File not Found -.resolution: 1. Type CMD in Start Menu and right click the result & run as administrator. 2. Type cmd and press enter. 3. Type net stop wuauserv and press enter. 4. Type rename c:\windows\SoftwareDistribution softwaredistribution.old and press enter. 5. Type net start wuauserv and press enter. 6. Type exit and press enter. 7. Restart the ConfigMgr Agent Service. 8. Start the Software Update Scan and Deployment Cycles.

File or folder not accessible - (8000400.resolution: 1. Check the WUAHandler.log for Group policy settings were overwritten by a higher authority Error Code 0x87d00692. 2. Rename C:\Windows\System32\GroupPolicy\Machine\registry.pol 3. Restart the ConfigMgr Agent Service. 4. Start the Software Update Scan and Deployment Cycles.

Access denied for opening a file or regi.resolution: 1. Check the WUAHandler.log for Group policy settings were overwritten by a higher authority Error Code 0x87d00692. 2. Rename C:\Windows\System32\GroupPolicy\Machine\registry.pol 3. Restart the ConfigMgr Agent Service. 4. Start the Software Update Scan and Deployment Cycles.

No space available for installation -(80.resolution: 1. Check whether UpdateDeployment.log has "Update (Site_/SUM_) Progress: Status = ciStateError, PercentComplete = , DownloadSize = , Result = 0x80091007". 2. Check whether CAS.log has "Successfully raised SoftDistHashMismatchEvent event. ContentAccess Error: DeleteDirectory:- Failed to delete Directory with Error 0x00000003. ContentAccess Releasing content request ContentAccess There are 0 files in the directory compared to expected files ContentAccess 3. If the above conditions are true, then t

Missing or damaged file -(8007000D, 800B.resolution: Issue may be related to the windows update agent. Run the Update readiness tool to verify the same. https://support.microsoft.com/en-in/help/971058/how-do-i-reset-windows-update-components

Not connected to Windows Update Servers.resolution: 1. Check whether the Windows update log has Proxy specified. If yes continue. 2. Type CMD in Start Menu and right click the result & run as administrator. 3. Type netsh winhttp reset proxy. 4. Type net stop wuauserv and press enter. 5. Type rename c:\windows\SoftwareDistribution softwaredistribution.old and press enter. 6. Type net start wuauserv and press enter. 7. Type exit and press enter. 8. Restart the ConfigMgr Agent Service. 9. Start the Software Update Scan and Deployment Cycles.

Unable to get content location -(87D0066.resolution: 1. Restart Windows Update Agent. 2. Restart SMS Agent. 3. Initiate the Update Evaluation Cycle.

Update content not available on DP -(800.resolution: 1. Check whether the UpdatesHandler.log has the following entries. WSUS update (689c410a-44d7-45c7-ae51-9806fcb177f5) installation result = 0x80004002, Reboot State = NoReboot Update execution failed. 2. Check whether the WUAHandler.log has the following entries Failed to get final installation result of updates. Error = 0x80004002. Update 1 (unique update id) finished installing (0x80004002). Update 2 (unique update ID) finished installing (0x80004002). Installation of updates completed. 3. Che

Update files missing or corrupted -(8007.resolution: 1. Open Command prompt as administrator execute the commands on the given sequence. a. Net stop wuauserv b. Sc config wuauserv type= own c. Net start wuauser

Applications with Multiple Versions -(80.resolution: 1. Find the update getting failed and check the client has different versions of the application getting updated. 2. If the client has different versions of the application Open the Registry editor. 3. Navigate to the following registry keys HKEY_USERS\.DEFAULT\Software\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Explorer\User Shell Folders. 4. The correct and default value for AppData should be: %USERPROFILE%\AppData\Roaming 5. Close the Registry editor, and try again Windows Update again. (A reboot shoul

Missing / Conflicting Boundary -(800705B.resolution: 1. Add Missing IP Subnets to Boundary

WUA Not responding -(87D00600, 87D00662).resolution: 1. Restart Windows Update Agent. 2. Restart SMS Agent. 3. Initiate the Update Evaluation Cycle.'

Disable Branch Cache -(87D00314, 87D0027.resolution: 1. Restart BITS. 2. Disable Branch Cache(HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\PeerDist\Service. 3. Start the Update Evaluation cycle'

256.message: WINDOWS_CE. Use Windows CE as the device program. If this value is set, the program is not offered to desktop clients.

512.message: RUN_DEPENDANT_ALWAYS. Always run the immediate dependent of the program.

1024.message: COUNTDOWN. Display the countdown dialog box.

8192.message: UNATTENDED. The program requires no user interaction.

16384.message: USERCONTEXT. The program needs to run in the user context. Always set the value to 0.

32768.message: ADMINRIGHTS. The program must run under administrator rights.

65536.message: EVERYUSER. The program must be run by every user for whom it is valid. This setting is valid only for mandatory jobs. Always set the value to 0.

131072.message: NOUSERLOGGEDIN. The program is run only when no user is logged on.

262144.message: OKTOQUIT. Program shutdown is enabled. Always set the value to 0.

524288.message: OKTOREBOOT. Computer reboot is enabled. Always set the value to 0.

1048576.message: USEUNCPATH. Program access uses a Universal Naming Convention (UNC) path.

2097152.message: PERSISTCONNECTION. The program connection is persisted. Always set the value to 0.

4194304.message: RUNMINIMIZED. Maximize the program window. Always set the value to 0.

8388608.message: RUNMAXIMIZED. Minimize the program window. Always set the value to 0.

33554432.message: OKTOLOGOFF. Logoff is enabled. Always set the value to 0.

67108864.message: RUNACCOUNT. Run the program using account access.

134217728.message: ANY_PLATFORM. The program can run on any operating system.

Not Applicable.message: The number of apps for which status isn't applicable

Not Installed.message: The number of apps not installed

Completed.message: The deployment end date has passed.

0x00000020 (5).message: DONT_RUN_NO_LOCAL_DISPPOINT. Do not run the program if there is no local distribution point.

0x00000100 (8).message: DOWNLOAD_ON_DEMAND_FROM_LOCAL_DP. Download the program on demand from the local distribution point. This is only applicable for task sequences.

0x00000200 (9).message: DOWNLOAD_ON_DEMAND_FROM_REMOTE_DP. Download the program on demand from the remote distribution point. This is only applicable for task sequences.

0x00000400 (10).message: ONUSERLOGOFF. Announce the advertisement to the user on logoff.

0x00008000 (15).message: ADMINRIGHTS. The program must be run as the local Administrator account.

0x00010000 (16).message: ENABLE_PEER_CACHING. This information applies to System Center 2012 Configuration Manager SP1 or later, and System Center 2012 R2 Configuration Manager or later.

0x00020000 (17).message: DONOT_FALLBACK. Do not fall back to unprotected distribution points.

0x00040000 (18).message: ENABLE_TS_FROM_CD_AND_PXE. The task sequence is available to removable media and the pre-boot execution environment (PXE) service point.

0x00080000 (19).message: OKTOREBOOT. Configuration Manager restarts the computer when the program has finished running successfully.

0x00100000 (20).message: OVERRIDE_SERVICE_WINDOWS. Override maintenance windows in announcing the advertisement to the user.

0x00200000 (21).message: PERSISTCONNECTION. Persists the connection to the drive specified in the DriveLetter property. The USEUNCPATH bit flag must not be set.

0x00400000 (22).message: WAKE_ON_LAN_ENABLED. Announce the advertisement to the user with Wake On LAN enabled.

0x00800000 (23).message: SHOW_PROGRESS. Announce the advertisement to the user showing task sequence progress.

0x02000000 (25).message: Assign only if the device is currently connected to a high-bandwidth connection (default above 60 KBps).

0x04000000 (26).message: USE_BINARY_DELTA_REP. Marks the package to be replicated by distribution manager using binary delta replication.

0x10000000 (28).message: NO_PACKAGE. The package does not require distribution points.

0x01000000 (24).message: DO_NOT_DOWNLOAD. Do not download the package to branch distribution points, as it will be pre-staged.

0x00000001 (0).message: BATTERY_POWER. Run the program by using battery power. This value is currently unused.

0x00000002 (1).message: USECUSTOMPROGRESSMSG. The task sequence shows a custom progress user interface message.

0x00000004 (2).message: DOWNLOAD_FROM_CD. Download the program from CD. This value is currently unused.

0x00000008 (3).message: RUN_FROM_LOCAL_DISPPOINT. Run the program from the local distribution point.

0x00000010 (4).message: DOWNLOAD_FROM_LOCAL_DISPPOINT. Download the program from the local distribution point.

0x00000040 (6).message: DOWNLOAD_FROM_REMOTE_DISPPOINT. Download the program from the remote distribution point.

0x00000080 (7).message: For Advanced Client only. If set, this program's immediate dependent should always be run.

0x00000800 (11).message: The command requires Add Remove Programs to be restarted—for example, APASetup.exe.

0x00002000 (13).message: UNATTENDED. The program requires no user interaction.

0x00004000 (14).message: USERCONTEXT. The program can run only when a user is logged on.

0x0100011 (23).message: DO_NOT_ENCRYPT_CONTENT_ON_CLOUD. Do not encrypt content on the cloud. This information applies to System Center 2012 Configuration Manager SP1 or later, and System Center 2012 R2 Configuration Manager or later.

0x20000000 (29).message: USE_SPECIAL_MIF. This value determines if Configuration Manager uses MIFName, MIFPublisher, and MIFVersion for MIF file status matching. Otherwise, Configuration Manager uses Name, Manufacturer, and Version for status matching. For more information, see the Remarks section later in this topic.

0x40000000 (30).message: DISTRIBUTE_ON_DEMAND. The package is allowed to be distributed on demand to branch distribution points.

268435456.message: STILL_RUNNING. The program is currently running.

536870912.message: SUPPORT_UNINSTALL. The program has an uninstall utility. Always set the value to 0.

2147483648.message: SHOW_IN_ARP. Display the program in Add or Remove Programs.

10901.message: Unable to find the Windows PowerShell script in the location specified.

10902.message: No Windows PowerShell script was specified in the task sequence step.

10903.message: A terminating error was reported by the Windows PowerShell script.

MOSETUP_E_COMPAT_MIGCHOICE_BLOCK (0xC190.message: Selected migration choice isn't available. For example, an upgrade from Enterprise to Professional.

0x00000001.message: The enrollment succeeded, and the certificate has been issued.

0x00000002.message: The request has been submitted and the enrollment is pending, or the request has been issued out of band.

0x00000040.message: The status information has been skipped. This can occur if a HYPERLINK "" \l "_security_certification_authority_gly" certification authority is not valid or has not been selected for monitoring.

0x87D20417.message: Scenario: When running Configuration Manager version 2010, you may notice that an automatic deployment rule fails and returns Last Error Code of 0x87D20417. In the PatchDownloader.log, you see Failed to create temp file with GetTempFileName() at temp location C:\Windows\TEMP\, error 80 and 0-byte fi
0x87D20417.description: Workaround: Remove all the files from the temp directory specified in the PatchDownloader.log and rerun the ADR. Resolution: Install KB 4600089, Update Rollup for Microsoft Endpoint Configuration Manager current branch, version 2010.

0x80000007.description: Additional information for error resolution: Use the installation logs and Configuration Manager application logs to determine why installation stopped. Merge the logs so you can easily review what happened before the 0x80000007L error. Use eventvwr.msc to review the Windows event logs for additional events that occurred around the time of the installation failure.

Creation in progress.message: Intune has sent a deployment request to Zebra service.

Failed to create.message: Failed to create deployment in the Zebra service.

Created.message: Deployment is created but start date hasn't been reached.

Deployment in progress.message: Start date has been reached, and end date hasn't passed.

Cancellation requested.message: Intune has sent a cancellation request to the Zebra service.

Canceled.message: Deployment is successfully canceled with the Zebra service.

1460 (ERROR_TIMEOUT).message: Failed to download the Office Deployment Tool

13 (ERROR_INVALID_DATA).message: Can't verify the signature of the downloaded Office Deployment Tool

Error code from CertVerifyCertificateCha.message: Failed certification check for the downloaded Office Deployment Tool

1603 (ERROR_INSTALL_FAILURE).message: Failed any prerequisite check, such as:SxS (Tried to install when 2016 MSI is installed)Version mismatchOthers

0x8000ffff (E_UNEXPECTED).message: Tried to uninstall when there's no Click-to-Run Office on the machine

17002.message: Failed to complete the scenario (install). Possible reasons:Installation canceled by userInstallation canceled by another installationOut of disk space during installationUnknown language ID

Install Pending.message: The number of apps that are in the process of being installed

Yes.message: User enrolls via the status in device details for their current device or from apps that require enrollment.

No.message: There's no way for users to enroll. Apps requiring enrollment are hidden.

0x80072f9a.message: On Windows devices, when trying to sync in the Settings app > Accounts > Access work or school, you might see a The sync could not be initiated (0x80072f9a) error.
0x80072f9a.description: If the Trusted Platform Module (TPM) was reset to factory settings, then the device must reenroll to resume syncing. The device's Microsoft Entra identity is stored in the TPM. So, if the ID is removed, then reenrollment is the only way to reestablish the Microsoft Entra identity. ## Related articles

Noncompliant.message: Device is non-compliant and is blocked from corporate resources.

InGracePeriod.message: Device is non-compliant but still has access to corporate resources

Entra key can't be attested.message: Entra team didn't store the ENTRA certificate's key in TPM. This impacts AP ODJ enrolled devices.

Attestation is in process.message: Device is still working on attestation when Intune queries for its latest status.

TPM isn't trusted.message: Device contains a TPM that isn't trusted and therefore can't be attested.

TPM isn't available.message: Device doesn't have TPM 2.0 or TPM can't be attested due to firmware needing update. For more information on how to update firmware, see Resources

TPM isn't ready.message: TPM isn't ready to be used by this device. User needs to reset TPM ownership. For more information on how to reset TPM ownership, see Resources

Client request is rejected.message: Client's attestation request didn't reach MDM server or server rejected the request. Device owner should check to see if device can still authenticate with Entra. For more information, see Resources.

AIK certificate wasn't provided.message: AIK certificate is missing on the device. Could be due to network issue. If temporary, attestation would retry successfully once device receives AIK cert.

Client didn't provide all required param.message: Both AIK certificate and AIK public key are missing.

MDM key is already in TPM.message: Device indicates that the MDM key is already stored in TPM. But Intune is unable to attest it because AIK certificate or AIK public key is missing, or ENTRA key can't be attested.

Feature isn't supported.message: This status shows for devices that aren't yet attestable. Examples include Hyper-V and Azure virtual machines, Azure Virtual Desktop session hosts, Windows 365 Cloud PCs, Microsoft Dev Box.

Entra token doesn't match device identit.message: ENTRA token for enrollment doesn't match the ENTRA key presented in the enrollment request. You can fix this issue by upgrading to the latest Windows build and by retrying attestation.

2016330897.message: Your connection to Intune timed out. Reset your connection.

2016330896.message: You lost connection to the Internet. Reset your connection.

2016330895.message: You lost connection to the Internet. Reset your connection.

2016330894.message: You lost connection to the Internet. Reset your connection.

2016330893.message: You lost connection to the Internet. Reset your connection.

2016330891.message: The cellular data connection for this device can't be accessed while a phone call is being made. Wait for the phone call to complete.

2016330890.message: The cellular network for this device. These devices couldn't be used at this time.

2016330889.message: The secure connection failed. Reset your connection.

2016330888.message: The server trust evaluation has failed.

Another object with the same value for p.resolution: Make the user principal name (UPN) unique. This error occurs when the administrator attempts to create a user with an existing user name in Microsoft Entra ID. For more information, see User name policies.

Insufficient privileges to complete the.resolution: Find a Global Administrator or a User Administrator to add or delete the user. This error occurs when the security principal tries to create or delete users, but doesn't have the needed permissions. A Global admin can create or delete any user, including other admins. A User admin can create users and delete any non-admin users, Helpdesk administrators, and other User admins.

Property userPrincipalName is invalid..resolution: See User name policies for a list of allowed and disallowed characters. This error occurs when you create a new user with unacceptable characters in the UPN. The user name and email address properties also can't contain accent characters.

The specified password does not comply w.resolution: Avoid using a password that: Doesn't follow the Microsoft Entra password policies. Is on the custom banned password list. Contains the user name of the user.

The domain portion of the userPrincipalN.resolution: Make sure the domain you're using to create the user is on the list of verified domains in the Microsoft Entra admin center. The status of the domain needs to be Verified. If you've verified the domain status, see whether the domain is Federated (has a checkmark) or Managed (doesn't have a checkmark). You can only create users in Microsoft Entra ID for managed domains. For federated domains, you must create the user on the identity provider (IdP), and then sync to Microsoft Entra ID. You can't a

AdminRequired.message: Local administrator permissions are required to install Directory Synchronization

DirSyncAlreadyInstalled.message: The Directory Sync tool is already installed. Version {0}
DirSyncAlreadyInstalled.resolution: Uninstall all earlier versions of the Directory Sync tool before you try to install the latest version.

DirSyncInstallKeyNotRemoved.message: Windows Installer could not remove the uninstall registry key from the Azure Active Directory Sync MSI. Retry uninstall or contact Microsoft Online Support.
DirSyncInstallKeyNotRemoved.resolution: Manually remove the registry keys to complete the installation.

DirSyncNotInstalledError.message: A complete installation of the Azure Active Directory Sync tool was not detected on this machine. Please uninstall any versions of this tool and then reinstall the most recent version.
DirSyncNotInstalledError.resolution: Uninstall all earlier versions of the Directory Sync tool before you try to install the latest version.

ErrorReRunConfigWizard.message: Unable to start synchronization due to configuration issues. To fix the issues, try running the Configuration Wizard. If you continue to see this error, please contact Microsoft Online Support.
ErrorReRunConfigWizard.resolution: Run the Directory Sync tool Configuration Wizard.

WindowsInstaller45Required.message: Microsoft Windows Installer 4.5 is required for installation. Please install Microsoft Windows Installer 4.5 and try again.
WindowsInstaller45Required.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is being installed meets the minimum requirements.

ErrorClearRunHistory.message: Could not clear the run history on the MIIS Server. Error returned is '{0}'. Contact Microsoft Online support.

ErrorNoStartConnection.message: Synchronization failed to start because of connection issues or domain controllers could not be contacted by the server. Verify that you are connected to the server and all the configured domain controllers are connected to the network. If you have recently deleted domain or naming context, please r
ErrorNoStartConnection.resolution: Confirm that the local Active Directory domain controllers can be accessed from the server running the Directory Sync tool.

ErrorNoStartCredentials.message: Synchronization failed to start because of credential problems. Rerun Configuration Wizard to update credentials for Synchronization.
ErrorNoStartCredentials.resolution: Run the Directory Sync tool Configuration Wizard, and reenter credentials. Also, confirm that the credentials have Administrator access to the portal.

ErrorNoStartNoDomainController.message: Synchronization failed to start because the domain controller could not be contacted by the server. Verify that the domain controller is connected to the network.
ErrorNoStartNoDomainController.resolution: Confirm that the local Active Directory domain controllers can be accessed from the server running the Directory Sync tool.

ErrorStoppedConnectivity.message: Synchronization stopped because of connectivity loss. Restore connectivity to the server.
ErrorStoppedConnectivity.resolution: Confirm that the local computer can access the Internet. Have the user try to ping provisioning.microsoftonline.com to verify that the computer can reach the Microsoft Entra authentication system.

ErrorStoppedDatabaseDiskFull.message: Synchronization stopped because the SQL Server database used by the Synchronization server is full. Create some space in the SQL Server database.
ErrorStoppedDatabaseDiskFull.resolution: Free up space on the storage used to hold the directory synchronization SQL database. If the issue isn't resolved, the Directory Sync tool will be unable to run successfully, and the SQL database may be permanently damaged.

InstallNotAllowedOnDomainController.message: Microsoft Online Services Coexistence cannot be installed on a domain controller.
InstallNotAllowedOnDomainController.resolution: The Directory Sync tool can be installed only on domain-joined computers that aren't domain controllers.

InstallPathLengthTooLong.message: The installation path is too long. Provide a path of 116 characters or fewer and then try again.
InstallPathLengthTooLong.resolution: If you use a custom path for the installation of the Directory Sync tool, the total path must contain fewer than 116 characters.

InsufficientDiskSpace.resolution: There's insufficient space to install the Directory Sync tool on the local workstation.

InvalidPlatform.message: The Azure Active Directory Sync tool must be installed on a computer running Windows Server 2003 Service Pack 2 or later.
InvalidPlatform.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is being installed meets the minimum requirements.

InvalidUPNFormat.message: User Principal Name (UPN) is your logon name. This error is displayed when the user enters credentials for Microsoft Online that do not contain an "@" character.

ADCredsNotValid.message: The Enterprise Administrator credentials that you supplied are not valid. Supply valid credentials and try again.
ADCredsNotValid.resolution: The installation wizard couldn't verify that the user account that's used to install the tool is an enterprise administrator.

MachineIsDomainJoinedUserIsNot.message: The computer is joined to a domain, but the current user credentials do not have access permissions on the domain.
MachineIsDomainJoinedUserIsNot.resolution: Log on as a domain user by using an account that meets the minimum requirements before you try to install the Directory Sync tool.

MachineIsNotDomainJoined.message: The computer is not joined to any domain.
MachineIsNotDomainJoined.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is installed meets the minimum requirements.

MachineNotDomainJoined.message: The computer must be joined to a domain.
MachineNotDomainJoined.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is installed meets the minimum requirements.

MIISSyncIsInProgressError.message: The synchronization engine is busy. Retry this operation after this synchronization session is complete.
MIISSyncIsInProgressError.resolution: There's an existing operation being completed by MIIS. Any new operation can be completed only after the current operation is complete.

MIISUserAddRight_AccountNotFound.message: Account name:'{0}' could not be found. Error Code:{1}
MIISUserAddRight_AccountNotFound.resolution: The Directory Sync tool couldn't add the local account that's being used to complete the installation to the MIIS Admin Group. Manually add the user to the group to continue with the installation.

MIISUserAddRight_AddFailed.message: '{0}' could not be added to the account rights for '{1}'. Error code:{2}
MIISUserAddRight_AddFailed.resolution: The Directory Sync tool couldn't add the local account that's being used to complete the installation to the MIIS Admin Group. Manually add the user to the group to continue with the installation.

MIISUserAddRight_PolicyHandleNotFound.message: Failed to obtain the policy handle. Error Code:{0}
MIISUserAddRight_PolicyHandleNotFound.resolution: The Directory Sync tool couldn't add the local account that's being used to complete the installation to the MIIS Admin Group. Manually add the user to the group to continue with the installation.

PowerShellRequired.resolution: Make sure that the server on which the Directory Sync tool is installed meets the minimum requirements.

UnsupportedNameFormat.message: The name format is not supported. Two examples of the supported user name formats are: someone@example.com or example\someone.

UserNotAMemberOfMIISAdmins.message: The current user is not a member of the Microsoft Identity Integration Server (MIIS) Admin group. If you have recently installed the Azure Active Directory Sync tool, you may need to log off and then log on.
UserNotAMemberOfMIISAdmins.resolution: Manually add the local Active Directory user account that's used to run the Directory Sync tool to the MIIS Admin Group.

UserNotAnEnterpriseAdmin.message: User '{0}' is not a member of the Enterprise Admins group.
UserNotAnEnterpriseAdmin.resolution: Manually add the local Active Directory user account that's used to run the Directory Sync tool to the Active Directory Enterprise Admin Group.

UnsupportedClientVersion.message: This version of the Directory Sync tool is no longer supported. Remove this version and then install the latest version from the Directory Synchronization page of the Migration tab in the Microsoft Online Services Administration Center.
UnsupportedClientVersion.resolution: Download the latest version of the Directory Sync tool. To do so, go to Install or upgrade the Directory Sync tool.

InternetQueryOptionError.message: Internet Explorer proxy settings were not read. Initial configuration using setup wizard may not be able to access online help. WinInet Error {0}
InternetQueryOptionError.resolution: The installation wizard couldn't read or change proxy settings in Internet Explorer. Verify that the proxy settings that are set in Internet Explorer are formatted correctly.

InternetSetOptionError.message: Internet Explorer proxy settings were not set. Initial configuration using setup wizard may not be able to access online help. WinInet Error {0}
InternetSetOptionError.resolution: The installation wizard couldn't read or change proxy settings in Internet Explorer. Verify that the proxy settings that are set in Internet Explorer are formatted correctly.

RichCoexistenceNotAllowed.message: Current local directory does not have Exchange 2010 installed. Rich coexistence is not allowed.
RichCoexistenceNotAllowed.resolution: Install all the prerequisites for a hybrid deployment before you try to install the Directory Sync tool.
